x.shard_key: integer x from the frozen ladder
x.output: one scale manifest plus fixed-s views
x.retry: recompute only the missing x shard

side_class_bucket.shared_inputs: read-only prime/gap/delta arrays and D0 row
side_class_bucket.associative_commutative: integer reducers yes; byte order fixed by bucket index

class_range.shared_inputs: small-prime list and invariant band factor
class_range.output: A_P, domain, rho enclosure, realized rho/CRT
class_range.checkpoint: parent bucket is the checkpoint boundary
class_range.retry: rerun failed range before bucket commit

fixed_s.shared_inputs: s=0 side classes, prospective rho, realized cell rho
fixed_s.output: counts after deleting sites n < s+1

cloud.reason: Repository AGENTS.md requires local execution and forbids delegating repository computation to Codex Cloud.
cloud.data_transfer: Not applicable locally. A future operator-managed compute host would need the frozen registry, source/executable hashes, and per-x prime/gap/delta cache or regenerate it.
